---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Vibeman
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Error Messages

```
Paste any error messages or stack traces here
```

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Node.js version:** [e.g., 20.11.0]
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Vibeman version/commit:** [e.g., commit hash or version]

## CLI Provider (if applicable)

- **Provider:** [e.g., Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Copilot]
- **CLI version:** [e.g., claude --version output]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. For database-related issues, note whether the issue occurs on first run or after migrations.
